_comment: Golden regression fixture for the coaching pipeline. Values are produced by the deterministic mock provider stack and are exact (no randomness). Regenerate ONLY when a *_version below is intentionally bumped: run the snippet in test_golden_regression.py's module docstring, paste the new `expected` blocks, and bump the version fields. A diff here is a model/scoring behavior change and must be reviewed.

expected_units: hello everyone and welcome to the team
today we are launching our new product
our market is twenty billion dollars and growing
we have ten thousand paying customers already
join us in building the future of work

utterances.expected_text: my fellow citizens we stand at a turning point in our history
and together we will choose the harder right over the easier wrong
